---
title: "Rachel Ernst"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero-grid}

::: {.hero-text}
#### Some area of interest

:::
<!-- 
::: {.hero-image}
![](headshots/){alt="" class="headshot"}
![](headshots/){alt="" class="fieldshot"}
:::
-->

:::

<hr class="section-divider">

::: {.content-card}
## About Me

Your info!

Here you'll find information about my research, outreach and education activities, and my comprehensive lab notebook documenting ongoing projects and findings.
:::

<hr class="section-divider">

::: {.content-card}
## Contact

##### Rachel Ernst
 

##### Email:  
[reernst (at) wm.edu](mailto:reernst@wm.edu)  

##### Mailing Address:    
 

---

### Find me online

- [GitHub](Your Github link)  
:::
